limited.cloud: Request sequence is covered; Dart parses common ID3v2/ID3v1/FLAC/MP4 tags with bounded file-path probing but does not include a full music-metadata equivalent and falls back to query or sanitized filename.
limited.song_url_match: Depends on upstream unblockmusic-utils and returns an explicit limitation envelope in Dart.
limited.song_url_v1: Base xeapi and 302 fallback are covered; unblock=true degrades to the normal xeapi player URL, while actual unblock/source order depends on upstream unblockmusic-utils.
